narrative: Middle East escalation drives geopolitical risk premium as US-Iran tensions in the Strait of Hormuz keep crude elevated near $104; USD/JPY firms to 157.71 as 300bp Fed-BoJ carry sustains the bid despite intervention warnings. Gold higher +0.80% at $4,570; equities -0.41%; DXY +0.10%; VIX 17.7. Watch RBA policy decision and any further MoF intervention signals.
